label: Strategy Calibration Summary
description: Summarize replay and calibration work for live/backtest execution divergence.

inputs.name: round-dir
inputs.description: Path to the live round whose divergences were calibrated.

outputs.name: calibration_summary
outputs.description: Neutralized replay-model gaps, remaining promotion blockers, and next calibration jobs.

failureModes.description: Required same-market replay jobs have not been created or completed.

evidencePolicy: A backtest fill with a live no-fill is expected diagnostic evidence, not automatic failure.
Promotion requires enough samples to explain latency, queue competition, input freshness, and decision cadence.
Unexplained divergences create Backtest Parity or Execution tasks.
notes: Use this after completed-market review identifies live/backtest divergence.
